pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)Better Cave Dweller is a scarier rework of cave-based horror. It focuses on making the cave threat feel stronger, louder, and more intense.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)It feels like a more polished and more dangerous version of the usual cave stalker idea.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)It pushes cave tension harder than the simpler versions of the idea.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its horror comes from making every underground sound and movement feel more threatening.
